name: Social Card Video Skin
description: Video player skin optimized for social media card embeds with muted autoplay

classes.container: relative w-full aspect-video overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-zinc-900 shadow-xl
classes.controlsBar: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3 bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur-lg
classes.playButton: flex items-center justify-center w-11 h-11 rounded-xl hover:bg-rose-500/15 active:scale-95 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.timeline: flex-1 h-2 bg-zinc-100/15 rounded-full cursor-pointer relative group overflow-hidden
classes.timelineProgress: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-rose-500 rounded-full pointer-events-none transition-all duration-150
classes.timelineBuffered: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 bg-zinc-100/25 rounded-full pointer-events-none
classes.timelineHoverIndicator: absolute inset-y-0 bg-rose-500/30 rounded-full pointer-events-none opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity
classes.unmuteButton: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer transition-colors
classes.fullscreenButton: flex items-center justify-center w-11 h-11 rounded-xl hover:bg-rose-500/15 active:scale-95 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.settingsButton: flex items-center justify-center w-11 h-11 rounded-xl hover:bg-rose-500/15 active:scale-95 transition-all cursor-pointer
classes.loadingSpinner: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-zinc-900/70 backdrop-blur
classes.playOverlay: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-t from-zinc-900/80 via-zinc-900/40 to-transparent cursor-pointer
classes.playOverlayButton: w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl bg-rose-500 flex items-center justify-center shadow-2xl hover:bg-rose-600 hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all duration-200
classes.socialBadge: absolute top-4 right-4 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur text-xs text-zinc-100 font-medium
